title: 90G Fish-Shaped Sequins, Party Table Decoration, Confetti, Party Supplies, Diy Handicraft Materials.
features: 【Product Content】You Will Receive 90G Fish-Shaped Sequins. Each Sequin Is 1.5*1Cm In Size And Has A Variety Of Colors, Suitable For Party Decoration And Diy Crafts.

【Product Material】These Sequins Are Made Of Pvc Material, Environmentally Friendly And Safe. The Pvc Material Gives The Sequins A Good Gloss And Durability, And Is Not Easy To Fade, And Is Suitable For Use In Many Occasions.

【Unique Design】This Product Is Uniquely Designed With The Cute Shape Of Fish-Shaped Sequins And Colorful Colors To Add Fun And Beauty To Your Activities. Whether It Is Party Table Decoration Or Handicraft Production, It Can Easily Improve The Overall Effect.

【Widely Used】This Product Is Very Suitable For Various Parties And Activities, Such As Birthday Parties, Weddings, Festival Celebrations, Etc. Also Suitable For Diy Craft Making, Adding A Unique Sparkle To Your Work.
【Easy To Use】These Sequins Are Easy To Use, Just Sprinkle On The Tabletop Or Paste On Handicrafts. Lightweight And Portable Design Allows You To Decorate And Create Anytime, Anywhere.
